title: Miltonia endresii
taxonomy: Miltonia endresii is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This orchid species belongs to the subfamily Cymbidioideae. At the genus level, Miltonia endresii is part of the Miltonia genus, which comprises various species of orchids. It is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted to be a part of the Orchidaceae family.
